name: Seafood Quiche Squares
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Pillsbury refrigerated quick crescent dinner rolls (8 oz each)
6 ounces pkg frozen cooked shrimp, thawed and drained
6 ounces can crabmeat, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Unroll dough into 4 long rectangles and place crosswise in an ungreased 10 x 15 inch jelly roll pan. Press over the bottom and 1 inch up the sides to form a crust. Firmly press perforations to seal.
3. Bake at 400°F for 5 minutes. Remove from oven.
4. Sprinkle partially baked crust with cheeses, shrimp, and crabmeat.
5. In a large bowl, combine half & half, dry mustard, sauces, and eggs; mix well and pour over the ingredients.
6. Sprinkle with parsley.
7. Bake for additional 25 to 35 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean and edges are golden brown. Cool 5 minutes before cutting into squares. Serve warm. Makes 60 appetizers. Delicious made with 12 ounces broken lobster meat instead of shrimp and crabmeat.
